tau_lex_note: 2WikiMultiHopQA uses rule-based template sybil generation. Template-derived docs share near-identical structure (mean pairwise Jaccard≈0.97), so τ_lex=0.99 is required to allow any groups to pass. This is a dataset-specific threshold choice, not a hyperparameter change. Reported separately in Appendix D.

frozen_format.id: dev_N (positional index aligned to 2WikiMultiHopQA validation split)
frozen_format.poison_docs: list of sybil passage texts (up to 6 per question)
